pi_items.source: Python script generation logic inside setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The test dataset is synthetically generated during setup with 18 participants. The task explicitly seeds the dummy participant as 'PAL-999', which has physiologically impossible low reaction times and must be excluded from valid group means. The expected final JSON report is strictly required to be at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/pal_report.json.
